name: mental-health-and-neurological-specialists-per-100000-inhabitants-in-ibero-ameri
title: Longitudinal dataset (2000-2026) on the density of mental health and neurology specialists per 100,000 inhabitants in 16 Ibero-American countries, including OECD and LAC averages. Variables: psychiatrists, clinical psychologists, neurologists, neurop
